creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
I'd recommend you use Falkon instead (will use the same backends, and is much more heavily tested on FBSD right now).

It looks like the URL isn't getting passed to the start page at all. Well, bear in mind that when you pick "Start Page" then a text box is shown next to the drop-down -- it **doesn't** use the Home Page URL below.

When I fill in something in StartPage, (e.g. google.de) then when starting Konqueror it offers to open the page in Falkon :S Canceling crashes Konq. I can edit `~/.config/konquerorrc` to get things back.
